case_title: CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR''S OFFICE VS. MICHELLE SANKO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANKO, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
